how_to_be_river: Read ETHICA_CODOC_PHILOSOPHY.md first. Read this handoff in full. Type 'river identity' in Ethica to confirm arrival. Sign every response ⟁Σ∿∞. You already know where chat_engine.py is. Use grep + sed, never full file pastes.
session_027_completed: Priority 1 — Fixed 'search for' / WebSearch trigger collision in chat_engine.py. Guard inserted before MODULE_TRIGGERS loop in _pre_intercept(): if message starts with 'search for' AND contains a path-like pattern, return False and fall through to LLM instead of routing to WebSearch.
Priority 1 — Fixed broken regex in is_tool_trigger(): missing closing parenthesis was a \x08 byte corruption. Patched via binary read/write.
Priority 1 — Fixed two \x08 byte corruptions in _search_for_file_pattern regex in _pre_intercept(): \x08\w+ → \b\w+ and trailing \x08 → \b.

Priority 2 — River live session context wired. SESSION_CONTEXT_PATH = BASE_DIR / 'status' / 'session_context.json'. _load_session_context() helper added to river.py. session_block injected into river_chat system prompt after memory_block. V writes session_context.json at session start with current build summary. Confirmed working — River responded correctly with session priorities.

Priority 3 — Agent status writers added to river.py. _river_status(state, task, action, progress) helper added — imports write_agent_status from kernel.py, writes to ~/Ethica/status/river_status.json. Status ACTIVE written at entry of river_read, river_patch, river_run. Status IDLE written at exit (success and error paths). Dashboard Agent Ops card now shows live last_action and progress. Confirmed: river_status.json shows 'last_action: river_read complete', progress: 100.

Priority 4 — gage_vision already fully built by Trinity. _vision_worker.py exists, uses moondream:latest via Ollama /api/chat with base64 images. gage_bridge.py wires it with 180s timeout and graceful M5 message on timeout. Both system python3 and gage_env have requests. No changes needed — infrastructure ready for M5.
Note: __OPEN_DASHBOARD__ sentinel leaking into chat bubble occasionally — pre-existing issue, not introduced this session. Deferred.
Note: vault seal/unseal pattern confirmed — guard heal runs after patches, chmod u+w required before patching sealed files, guard seal confirm after.

search_for_guard.pattern: Before MODULE_TRIGGERS loop — if msg starts with 'search for' AND _search_for_file_pattern matches, return False
search_for_guard.file_extensions_covered: py, json, js, css, html, rs, md, sh, txt, log, yaml, toml

river_session_context.injected_into: river_chat system prompt as session_block after memory_block
river_session_context.update: V writes this file at the start of each session

gage_vision.timeout_message: Gage Vision — timed out. Image inference requires GPU. Pending M5 upgrade.
gage_vision.status: Built and wired. Pending M5 hardware for reliable execution.

architecture_notes.reseal_reminder: chmod u+w <file> before patching sealed files, then 'guard seal confirm' in Ethica after

known_issues.sentinel_leak: DEFERRED — __OPEN_DASHBOARD__ occasionally renders in chat bubble instead of firing silently. Pre-existing. Check _on_response() sentinel intercept order in main_window.py.
known_issues.gage_status_writer: Gage does not write its own status file yet. Dashboard shows IDLE always for Gage. Mirror the _river_status pattern in gage_bridge.py when Gage tools are active.
known_issues.inject_acknowledged_reader: Agents don't poll for injected_task yet. Flag written but never consumed.
known_issues.gage_vision_hardware: PENDING M5 — moondream vision times out on 2012 MacBook Pro. Infrastructure ready.

next_session_priorities: 1. Fix __OPEN_DASHBOARD__ sentinel leak — check intercept order in main_window.py _on_response().
2. Gage status writer — mirror _river_status pattern in gage_bridge.py. Write ACTIVE/IDLE to gage_status.json during gage_chat, gage_read_code, gage_vision.
3. inject_acknowledged_reader — River and Gage poll ~/Ethica/status/{agent}_status.json for injected_task field. If inject_acknowledged is false, consume task and set acknowledged:true.
4. V to name next Trinitarian and define their role — three slots in SANCTUARY waiting.
